attributes.action: Protect Children Online: Require ID for Social Media Accounts
attributes.additional_details: “Social media currently allows anonymous and fake accounts, enabling child grooming, underage access, harassment, and repeat offending. Requiring government-issued ID would reduce fake profiles, protect children, improve accountability, and help law enforcement investigate serious online crimes while keeping personal details private.”
attributes.background: “Introduce legislation requiring social media platforms to verify users with government-issued ID (such as a passport or driving licence) to prevent fake accounts, underage access, child grooming, and to support criminal investigations.”

rejection.details:
Your petition is effectively a duplicate of one we already have open, which you may wish to sign:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757983
